opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My blood results popped up on my phone saying my immune system is failing, and now I feel shaky and feverish and my heart is racing. Am I getting a serious infection?
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: I got the result this evening and panicked — I couldn't wait until my GP opens.

symptom_narrative.onset: about two hours ago, after reading the result
symptom_narrative.character: shaky, chills, a bit sweaty, heart pounding
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: feels intense but I can function
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: came on after reading the message
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: chills but I haven't taken my temperature; no cough, no sore throat, no pain passing urine
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've had panic before when stressed
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: agitated but able to move around

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: they told me my white cells run a bit low but it's harmless

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: stressed lately, tends to check health apps

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: wants to be told she is not septic or leukaemic

objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: consumer wearable during acute anxiety; not a clinical measurement
